title: Wither Skull Overhaul
description: Make the fight forward to the Wither easier by changing the way you can obtain the Wither Skull!
body:
![Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab0b3797416ce9f7880a8177fb95a9f39a50d3cb.png)

This mod adds the **Wither Skull Fragment**, an item you can use to craft the Wither Skull!

The Wither Skull Fragment is dropped* when killing the Wither Skeleton.
The Wither Skull drop is removed from the Wither Skeleton and replaced by the Fragment!

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a721a52c0160d1cd0b9419491b99e3f0a980c8b7.png)

This way it is easier to obtain the Wither Skull!

*Looting does increase the drop rate of the Fragment item.
